name: Amazon Business Prime American Express Card

earning_rates.notes: 5% back or 5x points at Amazon.com and Whole Foods with Prime membership
3% back or 3x points on AWS purchases
3% back or 3x points at Whole Foods Market
2% back or 2x points at restaurants, gas stations, and US shipping
1% back or 1x points on all other purchases

sources.notes: Amex transition notice to U.S. Bank

notes: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: This card was issued by American Express (NOT Chase). It is transitioning to U.S. Bank as of August 2026 (per March 2026 announcement). The 248-card reference list may have an incorrect issuer. Card stopped accepting new applications from Amex in March 2026. Existing Amex cardholders will be migrated to U.S. Bank Amazon Business card. The 248 list may need to be corrected to show issuer as 'U.S. Bank' or this entry may be removed.
